name: cowork-obsidian
description: Wire Claude Cowork to a local Obsidian vault. Three skills: /onboard-second-brain (install wizard), /open-vault (daily-driver session starter), /second-brain (operational build/update/health-check). Auto-detect existing vaults or scaffold a new one. Three modes (external / overlay / scaffold). Sync across machines via Obsidian Sync, Syncthing, or Git/GitHub. Optional Claude Desktop MCP path. Multi-vault aware. Built by Nuno Tavares of Automated Marketer.
